Menus.EndString: Dost thou wish to leave with such hasty abandon?
Press N for more carnage. Press Y to be a weenie.
So, you think you can quit this easily, huh?
Press N to save the world. Press Y to abandon it in its hour of need.
Press N if you are brave. Press Y to cower in shame.
Heroes, press N. Wimps, press Y.
You are at an intersection. A sign says, 'Press Y to quit.' >
For guns and glory, press N. For work and worry, press Y.

Menu.Name: Main
Menu.OnCancel: if IsGameInProgress() then ResumeGame() else RequestQuit() end

Menu.Name: NewGame
Menu.OnSelectionChanged: -- Update the difficulty face picture based on current selection local index = GetSelectedIndex() if index == 0 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_BABYMODEPIC') elseif index == 1 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_EASYPIC') elseif index == 2 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_NORMALPIC') elseif index == 3 then SetPicture('DifficultyFace', 'C_HARDPIC') end

Menu.Name: Sound
Menu.OnSelectionChanged:
-- Update all toggle switches to reflect current sound settings local soundMode = GetSoundMode() local digiMode = GetDigiMode() local musicEnabled = GetMusicEnabled()
-- Sound Effects toggles if soundMode == "Off" then SetPicture('SoundFxNone', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxPC', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxAdLib', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') elseif soundMode == "PC" then SetPicture('SoundFxNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxPC', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxAdLib', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') elseif soundMode == "AdLib" then SetPicture('SoundFxNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxPC', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('SoundFxAdLib', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') end
-- Digitized Sound toggles if digiMode == "Off" then SetPicture('DigiNone', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('DigiSoundBlaster', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') elseif digiMode == "SoundBlaster" then SetPicture('DigiNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('DigiSoundBlaster', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') end
-- Music toggles if not musicEnabled then SetPicture('MusicNone', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('MusicAdLib', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') else SetPicture('MusicNone', 'C_NOTSELECTEDPIC') SetPicture('MusicAdLib', 'C_SELECTEDPIC') end

Menu.Name: LoadGame
Menu.OnShow: for i = 0, 9 do local name = GetSaveSlotName(i) if name == "" then SetItemText(i, "- empty -") else SetItemText(i, name) end end

Menu.Name: SaveGame
Menu.OnShow: for i = 0, 9 do local name = GetSaveSlotName(i) if name == "" then SetItemText(i, "- empty -") else SetItemText(i, name) end end

Menu.Name: ViewScores
Menu.OnShow: for i = 0, GetHighScoreCount() - 1 do local ep = GetHighScoreEpisode(i) + 1 local lvl = GetHighScoreCompleted(i) SetText("Name" .. i, GetHighScoreName(i)) SetText("Level" .. i, "E" .. ep .. "/L" .. lvl) SetText("Score" .. i, tostring(GetHighScoreScore(i))) end

Menu.Name: LevelComplete
Menu.OnShow:
local floor = GetFloor() SetText("FloorNumber", tostring(floor)) SetText("ParValue", FormatTime(GetParTime())) SetText("TimeValue", FormatTime(GetLevelTime()))
-- Calculate ratios local kr = GetKillTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetKillCount() * 100 / GetKillTotal()) or 0 local sr = GetSecretTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetSecretCount() * 100 / GetSecretTotal()) or 0 local tr = GetTreasureTotal() > 0 and math.floor(GetTreasureCount() * 100 / GetTreasureTotal()) or 0
-- Calculate time bonus (500 points per second under par) local parSec = GetParTime() local levelSec = GetLevelTime() local timeBonus = 0 if parSec > 0 and levelSec < parSec then timeBonus = math.floor((parSec - levelSec) * 500) end
-- Calculate total bonus local bonus = timeBonus if kr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end if sr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end if tr == 100 then bonus = bonus + 10000 end SetText("BonusValue", tostring(bonus)) GivePoints(bonus)
-- Queue intermission sequence (WL_INTER.C flow) -- Tickers count up one at a time, top to bottom -- Pressing any button during counting skips to final values QueueDelay(2) -- Pause before counting (~2*TickBase) StartTicker("KillRatio", kr) -- Kill ratio counts up StartTicker("SecretRatio", sr) -- Then secret ratio StartTicker("TreasureRatio", tr) -- Then treasure ratio

Menu.Name: HighScores
Menu.OnShow: CheckAndAddHighScore() for i = 0, GetHighScoreCount() - 1 do local ep = GetHighScoreEpisode(i) + 1 local lvl = GetHighScoreCompleted(i) SetText("Name" .. i, GetHighScoreName(i)) SetText("Level" .. i, "E" .. ep .. "/L" .. lvl) SetText("Score" .. i, tostring(GetHighScoreScore(i))) end

Menu.Name: Victory
Menu.OnShow:
SetText("TotalTimeValue", FormatTime(GetTotalTime()))
-- Calculate averaged ratios across all completed levels local kr = GetAverageKillRatio() local sr = GetAverageSecretRatio() local tr = GetAverageTreasureRatio()
-- Queue victory sequence (same ticker pattern as intermission) QueueDelay(2) StartTicker("AvgKillRatio", kr) StartTicker("AvgSecretRatio", sr) StartTicker("AvgTreasureRatio", tr)

WallPlane.Door: if Has("Gold Key") then return true end PlayLocalSound("NOWAYSND") return false
if Has("Silver Key") then return true end PlayLocalSound("NOWAYSND") return false
if Has("Gold Key") then return true end PlayLocalSound("NOWAYSND") return false
if Has("Silver Key") then return true end PlayLocalSound("NOWAYSND") return false

StatInfo.BonusScript: -- WL_ACT2.C:SpawnBJVictory: spawn BJ one tile south of player, facing north (dir=N=2) -- A_InitBJRun runs at spawn: computes corridor length, sets ReactionTimer, fires VictoryStarted SpawnActor("BJ", GetPlayerTileX(), GetPlayerTileY() + 1, 2) return true

Actors.Function: PlaySound("PLAYERDEATHSND") if GetValue("Lives") > 0 then AddValue("Lives", -1) SetValue("Health", 100) SetValue("Ammo", 8) SetValue("Gold Key", 0) SetPicture("GoldKey", "NOKEYPIC") SetValue("Silver Key", 0) SetPicture("SilverKey", "NOKEYPIC") SetValue("Weapon2", 0) SetValue("Weapon3", 0) SetValue("SelectedWeapon0", 1) SetValue("SelectedWeapon1", 1) SetValue("StatusBarWeapon", 1) SetPicture("WeaponPic", "GUNPIC") return "restart" end return "HighScores"

local grinTics = GetValue("FaceGrinTics") if grinTics > 0 then AddValue("FaceGrinTics", -1) SetPicture("Face", "GOTGATLINGPIC") return end local health = GetValue("Health") if health <= 0 then SetPicture("Face", "FACE8APIC") return end local level = math.min(7, math.floor((100 - health) / 16) + 1) local frames = {"A", "B", "C"} SetPicture("Face", "FACE" .. level .. frames[math.random(1, 3)] .. "PIC")

-- Game mechanics maxes (clamping) SetMax("Health", 100) SetMax("Ammo", 99) SetMax("Weapon0", 1) SetMax("Weapon1", 1) SetMax("Weapon2", 1) SetMax("Weapon3", 1) -- Inventory values. SetValue auto-updates StatusBar text where Text Id matches inventory key. -- Display width comes from the initial XML content length of the matching <Text Id="..."> element. -- Note: Difficulty is set by InitializeInventory from the menu selection, not overridden here. SetValue("Episode", 1) SetValue("Floor", 1) -- auto-updates "Floor" text (" 1", width 2) SetValue("Health", 100) -- auto-updates "Health" text ("100", width 3) SetValue("Ammo", 8) -- auto-updates "Ammo" text (" 8", width 2) SetValue("Lives", 3) -- auto-updates "Lives" text (" 3", width 2) SetValue("Score", 0) -- auto-updates "Score" text (" 0", width 6) SetValue("Gold Key", 0) SetPicture("GoldKey", "NOKEYPIC") SetValue("Silver Key", 0) SetPicture("SilverKey", "NOKEYPIC") SetValue("FaceGrinTics", 0) SetValue("Weapon0", 1) SetValue("Weapon1", 1) SetValue("Weapon2", 0) SetValue("Weapon3", 0) SetValue("SelectedWeapon0", 1) SetValue("SelectedWeapon1", 1) SetValue("StatusBarWeapon", 1) SetPicture("WeaponPic", "GUNPIC")
SetValue("Gold Key", 0) SetPicture("GoldKey", "NOKEYPIC") SetValue("Silver Key", 0) SetPicture("SilverKey", "NOKEYPIC")
